About Me

Welcome to my Portfolio! I believe that data is the most undervalued asset on a company's balance sheet. But data, in its raw form, is silent. My job is to give it a voice.

Hi, I'm Harshil. Data is silent. I make it speak — in revenue, margins, and decisions. I don't build dashboards; I build decision engines. Most analysts tell you what happened. I tell you why, what it costs, and what to do next.

The impact: ₹6 Cr → ₹20 Cr revenue in 24 months. Conversion rates 7% → 18% in Dutch retail. €1.08M in margin leakage uncovered through SQL-driven analysis — projecting €1.3M Year 1 impact.

Fully integrated into Dutch culture — direct, transparent, consensus-driven. I align Sales, Finance, and Marketing under a Single Source of Truth.

Let's build something that moves the needle.

📊 Power BI Project
Business Insights 360
Domain/Function: FMCG · Multi-Function (Finance, Sales, Marketing, Supply Chain, Executive)
End-to-end Power BI solution for AtliQ Hardware covering 5 business functions. Built a single source of truth with $4.97bn Net Sales tracked, dynamic KPIs, drill-through insights, and benchmark comparisons across regions and customers.
View on LinkedIn View on GitHub
Executive View — Net Sales $4.97bn, GM% 37.83%, Top Customers & Sub-Region Performance
Data Model — Complex multi-table model with fact & dimension tables across all business functions
Project Details
Business Insights 360 is a comprehensive Power BI dashboard built for AtliQ Hardware, a global FMCG company. The project delivers five interconnected views — Finance, Sales, Marketing, Supply Chain, and Executive — each designed for a specific leadership audience.

Key features include dynamic P&L statements, gross margin analysis, forecast accuracy tracking (79.83%), market share benchmarking, top customer and product analysis, and sub-region performance across NA, India, ROA, NE, SE, ANZ and LATAM.

The Executive view consolidates all KPIs into one decision-grade dashboard, enabling leadership to act on insights rather than data.
Project Video
📗 Excel Project
Sales & Finance Analytics
Domain/Function: Computer Peripherals (FMCG) / Data Analytics
Transformed disconnected data into a single source of truth. Unified fragmented Excel reporting using Power Pivot, DAX, and advanced modeling — delivering real-time business applications for sales and finance leadership.
View on LinkedIn View on GitHub
Data Model — Star Schema with fact & dimension tables
Customer Discount Approval — Best / Realistic / Worst case scenario analysis
Market Performance vs Target — Country-level analysis across all regions
Project Details
This project tackles the challenge of fragmented, siloed reporting across Sales and Finance at AtliQ Hardware. Using Excel Power Pivot, DAX measures, and dimensional data modeling, I built a unified reporting pack delivering real-time insights across customer performance, product margins, and market targets.

Key deliverables: a Customer Discount Approval tool with best/realistic/worst case scenarios, a Market Performance vs Target dashboard across 22 countries, and a full Star Schema data model connecting sales, product, customer, market and date dimensions.

The solution reduces manual reporting effort and gives leadership a single source of truth for commercial decisions.
Project Video
🗈 SQL Project
SQL Ad-Hoc Business Intelligence Analysis
Domain/Function: FMCG · Computer Peripherals
SQL BI case for AtliQ Hardware: answered 10 leadership ad-hoc questions, validated KPIs, and delivered an executive dashboard + management deck. Uncovered €1.08M in margin leakage projecting €1.3M Year 1 impact.
View on LinkedIn View on GitHub
Ad-Hoc Analysis Dashboard — Product growth, channel mix, quarterly distribution & top customers
Sample SQL Queries — Complex joins, subqueries and analytical functions used in the project
Project Details
Executive ad-hoc insights project for AtliQ Hardware (FY2020-FY2021). The goal was to convert 10 leadership ad-hoc business questions into decision-grade insights using SQL.

Key findings: portfolio growth of 36.33% (245→334 unique products), discount governance risk with top India customers averaging 29-31% discounts vs 22-25% industry benchmark, strong seasonality (Q1 33.72% vs Q3 9.99% of annual volume), and channel dependency (Retailer 73.21% of gross sales).

Final deliverables: SQL scripts, Excel/CSV outputs, dashboard snapshots, and an executive roadmap with actions and KPIs for leadership tracking.
Project Video
